choice: Income streams attach to either a Person (Social Security, pension, work) or an Asset (rental income, dividends); each has annual amount in today's dollars, COLA flag, and year-level availability (active ranges / excluded years, not just start-end). Contributions attach to a Person with per-year enable/disable. Assets can be owned by one or more Persons.
rationale: User: streams like rentals/dividends belong to assets; both streams and contributions need year-level gaps
